directive_events.owner_directive: 为啥要放到cli里 — move the backstop out of cli/main.py into scistudio/desktop/parent_watchdog.py; cli/main.py just imports and calls it.
directive_events.reason: Owner: parent-death backstop should not live in the cli arg-parsing module; move it to a dedicated desktop bundled-runtime lifecycle module, cli only wires it.

directive_events.owner_directive: PR A: OTA-deliverable parent-death backstop in scistudio/desktop/parent_watchdog.py; cli/main.py wires it in bundled+posix gui mode.

docs_events.rationale: internal bundled-runtime process-lifecycle hardening; no public API/UI/schema/contract change. Desktop spawn-lifecycle docs belong with the Electron-side PR.
alpha pre-release; orphan-backend fix is internal reliability, no user-facing changelog maintained at this stage.

owner_directive: Fix bundled backend orphan accumulation. PR A (this one): add an OTA-deliverable parent-death backstop in src/scistudio/cli/main.py so the bundled backend self-terminates when its Electron parent dies by any means. Desktop-side spawn-lifecycle fixes are a separate PR.
